Operation 'sendsms' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on input parameters (12 parameters available but not documented), doesn't explain credit deduction side effect, and doesn't clarify bulk vs. single message capability. Enhanced version specifies key inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Send a bulk SMS message to a phone number. Returns message ID on success or negative error code on failure.
data.description_suggestion: Sends an SMS message to one or more phone numbers. Accepts message content, recipient phone number(s), and optional parameters such as sender ID and scheduled delivery time. Returns a message ID for tracking on success, or an error code on failure. Deducts credits from the account balance for each message sent.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on input parameters (12 parameters available but not documented), doesn't explain credit deduction side effect, and doesn't clarify bulk vs. single message capability. Enhanced version specifies key inputs, outputs, and side effects for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getmessagestatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to specify what status information is returned and clarify that this is a read-only operation, helping AI agents understand the response structure and operation idempotency.

data.current_description: Request the delivery status of a sent message.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current delivery status of a previously sent SMS message using the message ID. Returns status information including delivery state (pending, delivered, failed, etc.), timestamp, and any error details if delivery failed. Does not modify message state.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description needs enhancement to specify what status information is returned and clarify that this is a read-only operation, helping AI agents understand the response structure and operation idempotency.

message: Operation 'getmessagedetails' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate. Description is too vague about what 'detailed information' includes. Enhanced version specifies the types of details returned (operator info, timestamps, error codes) and clarifies the use case, enabling AI agents to distinguish this from the simpler status endpoint.

data.current_description: Request detailed information about a sent message.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive delivery report details for a sent SMS message using the message ID. Returns extended information including delivery status, recipient phone number, message content, delivery timestamp, operator information, and any applicable error codes. Useful for detailed message tracking and troubleshooting delivery issues.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description is too vague about what 'detailed information' includes. Enhanced version specifies the types of details returned (operator info, timestamps, error codes) and clarifies the use case, enabling AI agents to distinguish this from the simpler status endpoint.

message: Operation 'cancelmessage' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description lack specificity about preconditions (message state requirements) and side effects (credit refund). Enhanced version clarifies which message states are cancellable, what the operation returns, and the credit refund side effect for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Cancel a pending or scheduled message.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels a pending or scheduled SMS message using the message ID. Only messages in pending or scheduled state can be cancelled; delivered or failed messages cannot be cancelled. Returns confirmation of cancellation or an error if the message cannot be cancelled. Refunds credits for cancelled messages.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity about preconditions (message state requirements) and side effects (credit refund). Enhanced version clarifies which message states are cancellable, what the operation returns, and the credit refund side effect for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getprices' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about response structure (price entries, fields included) and use cases. Enhanced version specifies the response format, includes relevant fields from PriceEntry schema, and clarifies the operation's purpose for cost estimation.

data.current_description: Get all available prices by countries.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves SMS pricing information organized by country and operator. Returns a list of price entries containing country code, operator name, and cost per message. Useful for calculating message costs before sending bulk campaigns. Pricing may vary based on message type and destination.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about response structure (price entries, fields included) and use cases. Enhanced version specifies the response format, includes relevant fields from PriceEntry schema, and clarifies the operation's purpose for cost estimation.

message: Operation 'verifypin' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear. Description lacks input parameter details (request ID requirement), output details (success/error responses), and operational context (use cases like 2FA). Enhanced version specifies required inputs, expected outputs, and typical use cases for better AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Verify a PIN code that was sent to a phone number.
data.description_suggestion: Verifies a PIN code that was previously sent to a phone number via SMS. Requires the phone number, PIN code, and verification request ID. Returns success confirmation if the PIN matches and is within the validity window, or an error if the PIN is incorrect or expired. Used for two-factor authentication and phone number verification workflows.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description lacks input parameter details (request ID requirement), output details (success/error responses), and operational context (use cases like 2FA). Enhanced version specifies required inputs, expected outputs, and typical use cases for better AI agent understanding of when to use this operation.
